name: SuiBuzz
one_liner: Decentralized short-form content platform where posts are owned objects users can trade and monetize.
sui_advantage: Each post is a Sui object with dynamic fields for comments/likes, enabling composable social graphs and true content ownership via object model.

name: ReputeChain
one_liner: On-chain reputation system that aggregates activity across Sui dApps into a portable trust score.
sui_advantage: Sui's object-centric model lets reputation be a composable object attached to any address, readable by any dApp via dynamic fields without oracles.

name: SuiDate
one_liner: Privacy-first dating app where profiles are encrypted on Walrus and matches use ZK proofs for compatibility.
sui_advantage: Seal encryption ensures profile data is only revealed to matches, zkLogin removes wallet friction, and Walrus stores encrypted media cheaply.

name: ThreadVault
one_liner: Decentralized forums where each thread is a shared object and moderators are governed by token-weighted DAO votes.
sui_advantage: Shared objects allow concurrent writes to the same thread without conflicts, and PTBs enable atomic moderation actions across multiple posts.

name: SuiChat
one_liner: End-to-end encrypted messaging app with built-in SUI payments and NFT sharing.
sui_advantage: Seal provides encryption key management, PTBs allow sending a message and payment in one atomic transaction, zkLogin for easy onboarding.

name: IdentitySui
one_liner: Self-sovereign identity platform where credentials are verifiable on-chain without revealing personal data.
sui_advantage: Sui objects represent credentials that can be selectively disclosed using Seal encryption, while zkLogin bridges Web2 identity to Web3 seamlessly.

name: FanCircle
one_liner: Token-gated fan communities where membership NFTs unlock exclusive content and direct creator interaction.
sui_advantage: Dynamic NFT objects can evolve with engagement level, Walrus stores gated content, and sponsored transactions let fans interact without holding SUI.

name: VoiceDAO
one_liner: Audio-first social platform where conversations are recorded as NFTs and governed by community DAOs.
sui_advantage: Walrus provides decentralized audio storage, Sui objects represent conversation NFTs with royalty splits enforced via PTBs.

name: SuiMeet
one_liner: Professional networking app where verified credentials and endorsements live as on-chain attestations.
sui_advantage: Attestations as Sui objects can be queried by any dApp, SuiNS provides human-readable professional profiles, zkLogin onboards LinkedIn users instantly.

name: Memeboard
one_liner: Meme creation and trading platform where viral memes earn creator royalties on every share.
sui_advantage: Meme NFTs with dynamic fields track virality on-chain, PTBs handle royalty splits atomically, Walrus stores media content permanently.

name: TribeLink
one_liner: Interest-based micro-communities where membership and governance are managed through soulbound tokens.
sui_advantage: Non-transferable Sui objects serve as soulbound membership tokens, shared objects enable concurrent community activity without bottlenecks.

name: SuiStories
one_liner: Ephemeral content sharing platform where stories auto-expire but can be preserved as collectible NFTs by fans.
sui_advantage: Sui's epoch-based expiry and object deletion enable true ephemeral content, Walrus handles media storage with time-limited access via Seal.

name: LinkTree3
one_liner: Web3 link-in-bio tool powered by SuiNS that aggregates all on-chain and off-chain profiles.
sui_advantage: SuiNS names serve as the universal identifier, dynamic fields on name objects store all linked profiles, zkLogin connects Web2 accounts.

name: SuiSignal
one_liner: Anonymous whistleblowing and truth-telling platform with on-chain verification of claims.
sui_advantage: Seal encryption protects whistleblower identity while allowing time-locked revelation, Sui objects provide immutable audit trails.

name: NeighborNet
one_liner: Hyperlocal social network where neighborhoods coordinate through geofenced community boards.
sui_advantage: Location-based Sui objects represent community boards, sponsored transactions remove barriers for non-crypto locals, zkLogin via Google for easy signup.

name: BookmarkDAO
one_liner: Collaborative bookmark curation where communities curate and vote on the best links across the web.
sui_advantage: Bookmarks as shared objects allow concurrent upvoting, PTBs batch multiple curation actions, Walrus stores link snapshots permanently.

name: SuiReview
one_liner: Verified review platform where reviews are tied to proven purchases and reviewers earn tokens.
sui_advantage: On-chain purchase receipts as Sui objects prove ownership, making review authenticity verifiable; sponsored transactions let reviewers post for free.

name: PenPalChain
one_liner: Global pen-pal matching platform where letters are sealed NFTs only the recipient can open.
sui_advantage: Seal encrypts letters so only the designated recipient can decrypt, letter NFTs become collectible keepsakes, zkLogin for global accessibility.

name: DebateArena
one_liner: Structured debate platform where participants stake tokens on their arguments and audiences judge outcomes.
sui_advantage: PTBs atomically handle staking, judging, and payout in a single transaction; shared objects track live debate state for concurrent audience interaction.

name: SuiAlumni
one_liner: Alumni network where university credentials unlock gated groups and mentorship opportunities.
sui_advantage: Verifiable credential objects issued by universities are non-transferable, SuiNS provides .edu-style naming, zkLogin via university SSO.

name: QuestRealm
one_liner: Fully on-chain RPG where characters, items, and quests are all composable Sui objects.
sui_advantage: Sui's object model allows items to be nested inside character objects, PTBs execute complex multi-step combat in one transaction, sub-second finality for real-time gameplay.

name: CardForge
one_liner: Digital trading card game where cards are dynamic NFTs that evolve based on battle history.
sui_advantage: Dynamic fields on card objects store battle stats and evolution history, PTBs handle deck building and card fusion atomically.

name: LootSwap
one_liner: Cross-game item trading marketplace where gaming assets from any Sui game can be listed and swapped.
sui_advantage: Sui's universal object model means any game item is a first-class tradeable object; PTBs enable atomic multi-item swaps across games in one transaction.

name: GuildVault
one_liner: On-chain guild management with shared treasuries, loot distribution, and governance voting.
sui_advantage: Shared objects represent guild treasuries accessible by multiple members concurrently, PTBs distribute loot to all members atomically.

name: TourneyChain
one_liner: Decentralized tournament platform with automated brackets, prize pools, and verifiable results.
sui_advantage: PTBs handle registration, bracket advancement, and prize distribution atomically; sponsored transactions let players compete without holding SUI.

name: PetVerse
one_liner: Virtual pet game where pets are dynamic NFTs that grow, breed, and interact based on owner care.
sui_advantage: Pet objects use dynamic fields to track hunger, happiness, and evolution; child objects represent offspring with inherited traits from parent objects.

name: ChessOnChain
one_liner: Fully on-chain chess with rated matchmaking, staked games, and provably fair move validation.
sui_advantage: Shared objects track game state with sub-second finality for each move, PTBs validate and execute moves atomically, sponsored transactions for free casual play.

name: CraftWorld
one_liner: Minecraft-style building game where structures are composable objects built from craftable resource NFTs.
sui_advantage: Object composition lets structures contain nested room objects with item objects inside them, PTBs batch complex crafting recipes into single transactions.

name: RaceProtocol
one_liner: On-chain racing game with upgradeable vehicle NFTs and real-time multiplayer via shared objects.
sui_advantage: Vehicle objects with dynamic fields for parts allow upgrades, shared race objects handle concurrent player inputs, sub-second finality enables real-time racing.

name: SuiArcade
one_liner: Retro arcade platform where high scores are verified on-chain and players earn tokens per play.
sui_advantage: Sponsored transactions let players insert virtual quarters without gas, leaderboards as shared objects update concurrently, zkLogin for instant play.

name: StrategyDAO
one_liner: Turn-based strategy game where armies are NFT collections and battles resolve via on-chain logic.
sui_advantage: Army objects own nested unit objects with stats as dynamic fields, PTBs resolve complex multi-unit battles in a single transaction.

name: SkinMarket
one_liner: Gaming cosmetics marketplace where skins work across multiple Sui games via a shared standard.
sui_advantage: A common Sui object interface for cosmetics means any game can render the same skin NFT, DeepBook provides orderbook liquidity for rare items.

name: DungeonCrawl
one_liner: Roguelike dungeon crawler with procedurally generated levels seeded by on-chain randomness.
sui_advantage: On-chain randomness from Sui's random module ensures provably fair level generation, loot drops as owned objects have real scarcity.

name: BetBrawl
one_liner: Skill-based wagering platform for casual games like trivia, puzzles, and reaction tests.
sui_advantage: PTBs atomically lock wagers from both players and pay the winner in a single transaction, sub-second finality keeps gameplay snappy.

name: FarmChain
one_liner: On-chain farming simulation where crops, livestock, and land are composable tradeable objects.
sui_advantage: Farm objects own land plots that contain crop objects, dynamic fields track growth timers, PTBs batch harvest-and-sell operations atomically.

name: FantasyLeague
one_liner: Decentralized fantasy sports with player card NFTs, automated scoring, and trustless prize pools.
sui_advantage: Player card objects with dynamic fields update stats from oracles, PTBs handle draft picks and trades atomically, shared league objects for concurrent scoring.

name: PuzzleQuest
one_liner: Daily puzzle game where solvers earn collectible proof-of-solve NFTs and compete on leaderboards.
sui_advantage: Proof-of-solve objects are timestamped by Sui consensus for fair ordering, sponsored transactions make daily participation free, zkLogin for mass adoption.

name: AutoBattler
one_liner: Auto-battler where team compositions are submitted as transactions and battles resolve deterministically on-chain.
sui_advantage: Deterministic Move execution ensures fair battle resolution, unit objects with dynamic fields track upgrades, PTBs submit full team compositions atomically.

name: MiniGames Hub
one_liner: Platform hosting dozens of simple on-chain mini-games with shared currency and cross-game achievements.
sui_advantage: Achievement objects earned in one game are readable by all others via Sui's object model, sponsored transactions keep all games free-to-play.

name: CardTrader Pro
one_liner: Professional-grade trading platform for gaming NFTs with orderbook matching, rarity analytics, and price history.
sui_advantage: DeepBook provides native orderbook infrastructure for gaming NFT markets, Sui's low latency enables real-time price discovery and instant settlement.

name: TuneToken
one_liner: Music platform where artists release tracks as NFTs and fans earn from early discovery.
sui_advantage: Walrus stores audio files decentrally, dynamic NFT fields track play counts and royalty splits, PTBs distribute streaming revenue to all stakeholders atomically.

name: FanCoin
one_liner: Creator fan token platform where creators launch personal tokens that unlock tiered access and perks.
sui_advantage: Sui's Coin standard makes fan token creation trivial, PTBs bundle token purchase with perk unlocking, sponsored transactions onboard non-crypto fans.

name: TipJar
one_liner: One-click micro-tipping for any content creator across platforms, settled instantly on Sui.
sui_advantage: Sub-second finality makes micro-tips feel instant, zkLogin lets fans tip via Google account, sponsored transactions mean 100% of tip goes to creator.

name: CrowdSui
one_liner: Decentralized crowdfunding where backers receive dynamic NFTs that evolve as project milestones are hit.
sui_advantage: Milestone-based fund release via PTBs with multi-sig, backer NFTs use dynamic fields to track project progress, Walrus stores project updates.

name: PatronVault
one_liner: Recurring patronage platform where supporters subscribe to creators with auto-renewing on-chain payments.
sui_advantage: PTBs handle subscription renewal, tier upgrade, and content access grant in one transaction; sponsored transactions subsidize patron gas costs.

name: ArtDrop
one_liner: Generative art platform where algorithms produce unique pieces minted as NFTs at creation time.
sui_advantage: On-chain randomness seeds generative algorithms for provably unique art, Walrus stores high-res outputs, Sui's low mint costs enable large collections.

name: WritersBlock
one_liner: Decentralized publishing platform where articles are stored on Walrus and monetized through reader tips and subscriptions.
sui_advantage: Walrus provides censorship-resistant content storage, Seal encrypts premium content for subscribers only, zkLogin onboards writers from Medium/Substack.

name: PodVault
one_liner: Podcast hosting platform where episodes are stored on Walrus and listeners earn tokens for engagement.
sui_advantage: Walrus stores podcast files permanently and cheaply, listener engagement tracked via Sui objects, sponsored transactions let listeners interact for free.

name: CollabCanvas
one_liner: Collaborative digital art canvas where multiple artists contribute to shared pieces and split revenue.
sui_advantage: Shared canvas objects allow concurrent artist contributions, PTBs handle revenue splits across all contributors atomically, Walrus stores artwork layers.

name: MemeMint
one_liner: One-click meme NFT minting with automatic template detection and remix royalty tracking.
sui_advantage: Parent-child object relationships track meme remixes and enforce original creator royalties, Walrus stores meme media, low gas costs for mass minting.

name: VideoVerse
one_liner: Short-form video platform where creators earn directly from views without platform middlemen.
sui_advantage: Walrus stores video content decentrally, view attestations as Sui objects trigger micropayments via PTBs, zkLogin brings TikTok-style onboarding.

name: PhotoProof
one_liner: Photography platform where images are timestamped and watermarked on-chain to prove original authorship.
sui_advantage: Image hashes stored as Sui objects provide immutable proof of creation, Walrus stores originals, Seal encrypts high-res versions for buyers only.

name: CourseForge
one_liner: Online course marketplace where instructors tokenize courses and students earn completion credentials.
sui_advantage: Course content on Walrus with Seal-encrypted premium lessons, completion credentials as non-transferable Sui objects, PTBs handle enrollment and payment atomically.

name: DesignBazaar
one_liner: Marketplace for digital design assets where usage licenses are enforced as on-chain objects.
sui_advantage: License objects with dynamic fields track usage rights and expiry, PTBs handle purchase-and-license-grant atomically, Walrus stores design files.

name: RecipeNFT
one_liner: Cookbook platform where chefs mint recipes as collectible NFTs and earn from every cook-along.
sui_advantage: Recipe objects with dynamic fields track ratings and cook counts, Walrus stores recipe media, sponsored transactions let food lovers collect for free.

name: LoyaltySui
one_liner: Universal loyalty points platform where points from different brands are interoperable and tradeable.
sui_advantage: Points as Sui Coin objects are natively interoperable across dApps, PTBs enable atomic cross-brand point swaps, sponsored transactions for seamless UX.

name: CashbackChain
one_liner: Crypto cashback platform where purchases at partner merchants automatically earn SUI rewards.
sui_advantage: PTBs handle purchase verification and cashback distribution atomically, zkLogin connects traditional shoppers, sponsored transactions hide crypto complexity.

name: ReferralRing
one_liner: On-chain referral tracking system where multi-level referral chains are transparently recorded and rewarded.
sui_advantage: Referral chain objects use parent-child relationships to track multi-level referrals, PTBs distribute rewards up the chain atomically.

name: StampCard
one_liner: Digital stamp card system where businesses issue dynamic NFT cards that fill up with each visit.
sui_advantage: Stamp card objects use dynamic fields to track stamps, businesses sponsor transactions so customers never pay gas, zkLogin via Google for instant signup.

name: QuestRewards
one_liner: Gamified engagement platform where brands create on-chain quests with verifiable completion rewards.
sui_advantage: Quest objects track progress via dynamic fields, PTBs verify completion criteria and distribute rewards atomically, sponsored transactions for frictionless participation.

name: MemberPass
one_liner: NFT-based membership passes that unlock tiered benefits across a network of partner businesses.
sui_advantage: Membership NFTs with dynamic fields track tier status and benefits, any Sui dApp can read membership level for access gating without APIs.

name: PointSwap
one_liner: DEX for loyalty points where users trade points between different loyalty programs.
sui_advantage: DeepBook provides orderbook infrastructure for point trading pairs, PTBs handle multi-point swaps atomically, Sui's Coin standard unifies point representation.

name: SuiPerks
one_liner: Employee perks platform where companies issue benefit tokens redeemable at partner merchants.
sui_advantage: Perk tokens as Sui Coin objects with expiry logic in Move, PTBs handle redemption and merchant settlement atomically, zkLogin for employee access.

name: ReviewReward
one_liner: Platform where verified purchasers earn tokens for honest product reviews, with quality scoring.
sui_advantage: Purchase receipt objects prove authenticity, review quality tracked via dynamic fields with community voting, sponsored transactions make reviewing free.

name: CheckInChain
one_liner: Location-based check-in rewards app where visiting venues earns collectible proof-of-presence NFTs.
sui_advantage: Check-in objects are timestamped by Sui consensus for authenticity, dynamic fields track visit streaks, sponsored transactions for zero-friction check-ins.

name: SuiStreaks
one_liner: Habit-tracking app where maintaining daily streaks earns escalating token rewards and achievement NFTs.
sui_advantage: Streak objects with dynamic fields track consecutive days, epoch-based timing ensures fairness, sponsored transactions remove daily friction.

name: BountyBoard
one_liner: Community bounty platform where brands post challenges and users earn rewards for completing marketing tasks.
sui_advantage: Bounty objects with escrow lock funds until PTBs verify completion and release payment atomically, sponsored transactions for task submission.

name: AirdropEngine
one_liner: Targeted airdrop platform where tokens are distributed based on on-chain behavior and engagement criteria.
sui_advantage: PTBs can distribute tokens to thousands of recipients in batched transactions, Sui's object model enables complex eligibility checks on-chain.

name: SuiGift
one_liner: Digital gift card platform where gift cards are NFTs that can be personalized, wrapped, and regifted.
sui_advantage: Gift card objects can be wrapped in decorative NFT wrappers using object composition, PTBs handle purchase-wrap-send atomically, zkLogin for gifting to non-crypto friends.

name: MileageChain
one_liner: Unified travel miles platform where airlines and hotels share a common on-chain rewards ecosystem.
sui_advantage: Miles as fungible Coin objects are natively tradeable and composable across programs, DeepBook enables miles-to-miles exchange markets.

name: LearnQuest
one_liner: Learn-to-earn platform where completing blockchain courses earns verifiable credentials and token rewards.
sui_advantage: Credential objects are non-transferable Sui objects proving skill mastery, sponsored transactions make learning free, zkLogin onboards students instantly.

name: CertChain
one_liner: On-chain certification platform where institutions issue tamper-proof diplomas and certificates.
sui_advantage: Certificate objects are non-transferable and issuer-verified, any employer can verify on-chain without contacting the institution, SuiNS for institutional identity.

name: TutorMatch
one_liner: Decentralized tutoring marketplace with escrowed payments and on-chain reputation scores.
sui_advantage: PTBs handle session booking, escrow lock, completion confirmation, and payment release atomically; tutor reputation as dynamic fields on profile objects.

name: SkillProof
one_liner: Skill verification platform where coding challenges and assessments produce on-chain proof of ability.
sui_advantage: Assessment results as Sui objects with dynamic fields store scores and skill levels, Walrus stores assessment content, results are universally verifiable.

name: FlashcardDAO
one_liner: Community-curated flashcard decks where contributors earn tokens when others study their content.
sui_advantage: Flashcard deck objects are shared resources with contributor tracking via dynamic fields, PTBs distribute study rewards to deck creators atomically.

name: StudyGroup
one_liner: Accountable study groups where members stake tokens and lose them for missing sessions.
sui_advantage: PTBs handle stake locking, attendance verification, and redistribution atomically; group objects track member progress via dynamic fields.

name: LanguageSwap
one_liner: Language exchange platform where native speakers teach each other and earn tokens for sessions.
sui_advantage: Session objects with dual-confirmation via PTBs ensure both parties attest to completion before payment, zkLogin enables global participation.

name: QuizBattle
one_liner: Competitive quiz platform where players wager tokens on trivia battles across academic subjects.
sui_advantage: PTBs atomically lock wagers and distribute winnings, on-chain randomness selects questions fairly, sponsored transactions for casual free-to-play mode.

name: MentorChain
one_liner: Mentorship marketplace where industry experts offer 1-on-1 guidance with on-chain scheduling and payment.
sui_advantage: Mentor time-slot objects are bookable via PTBs with atomic payment, reputation tracked via dynamic fields, zkLogin for professional onboarding.

name: ResearchBounty
one_liner: Platform where organizations post research questions and reward the best answers with crypto bounties.
sui_advantage: Bounty objects with escrow, multi-judge evaluation via shared objects, and PTBs for atomic reward distribution; Walrus stores research submissions.

name: FitMint
one_liner: Fitness tracking app where workouts mint dynamic NFTs that level up with consistent exercise.
sui_advantage: Fitness NFTs use dynamic fields to track workout history and level progression, sponsored transactions make daily workout logging free.

name: HealthVault
one_liner: Personal health data vault where users own their medical records and selectively share with providers.
sui_advantage: Seal encrypts health records so only authorized providers can access specific data, health record objects are owned by the patient not the provider.

name: WellnessWager
one_liner: Group wellness challenges where participants stake tokens and those who hit goals split the pot.
sui_advantage: PTBs handle stake collection, goal verification, and winner distribution atomically; challenge objects track progress via dynamic fields.

name: StepQuest
one_liner: Step-counting adventure game where daily steps advance your character through an on-chain quest narrative.
sui_advantage: Character objects with dynamic fields track quest progress, step milestones trigger on-chain events via PTBs, sponsored transactions for daily updates.

name: MindfulMint
one_liner: Meditation app where completing sessions earns collectible mindfulness NFTs and builds a zen garden.
sui_advantage: Garden objects grow with nested plant objects earned from meditation, dynamic fields track session streaks, sponsored transactions for daily practice.

name: NutriTrack
one_liner: Nutrition logging platform where food diaries earn health tokens redeemable at wellness partners.
sui_advantage: Daily log objects use dynamic fields for nutritional data, PTBs batch weekly token rewards, Walrus stores meal photos for verification.

name: SleepScore
one_liner: Sleep tracking competition where users earn rewards for consistent sleep schedules and compete on leaderboards.
sui_advantage: Sleep data objects with dynamic fields track patterns, shared leaderboard objects handle concurrent updates, sponsored transactions for passive daily logging.

name: GymDAO
one_liner: Community-owned gym membership DAO where members govern equipment purchases, hours, and trainer hiring.
sui_advantage: Membership NFTs double as governance tokens, PTBs handle proposal creation and voting atomically, treasury as a shared object with multi-sig access.

name: RecoveryLog
one_liner: Injury recovery tracking app where physical therapy progress is recorded on-chain for insurance verification.
sui_advantage: Recovery milestone objects verified by therapist co-signing via PTBs, Seal encrypts sensitive medical data, Walrus stores progress photos.

name: HydroRemind
one_liner: Water intake tracking app with streak rewards and community hydration challenges.
sui_advantage: Ultra-low transaction costs make logging each glass of water economical, streak objects with dynamic fields, sponsored transactions for zero-friction logging.

name: SuiTickets
one_liner: NFT ticketing platform that eliminates scalping through transfer rules enforced in Move smart contracts.
sui_advantage: Ticket objects with custom transfer policies in Move prevent unauthorized resale, PTBs handle purchase and seat assignment atomically, zkLogin for mainstream buyers.

name: EventForge
one_liner: Decentralized event management platform with on-chain RSVPs, ticket sales, and attendee verification.
sui_advantage: Event objects with dynamic fields manage capacity, RSVPs, and check-ins; PTBs handle batch ticket sales; sponsored transactions for free RSVP.

name: StayCrypto
one_liner: Decentralized travel booking where hotels and hosts list directly and travelers pay in SUI with instant settlement.
sui_advantage: Booking objects with escrow via PTBs release payment after stay confirmation, review objects build host reputation, zkLogin for travelers.

name: FoodDrop
one_liner: Crypto food ordering platform where restaurants save on fees and customers earn loyalty tokens per order.
sui_advantage: Order objects track status via dynamic fields, PTBs handle order-payment-loyalty-reward in one transaction, sponsored transactions for seamless ordering.

name: WardrobeNFT
one_liner: Digital fashion marketplace where clothing brands sell virtual wearables as NFTs for avatars and AR.
sui_advantage: Wearable NFTs with dynamic fields store compatibility metadata for multiple platforms, Walrus stores 3D assets, DeepBook enables secondary market trading.

name: ParkingDAO
one_liner: Peer-to-peer parking space marketplace where homeowners rent driveways to commuters.
sui_advantage: Time-slot objects represent parking availability, PTBs handle booking-payment-access atomically, sponsored transactions for frictionless parking.

name: SuiSplitter
one_liner: Bill-splitting app where group expenses are tracked on-chain and settlements happen instantly in SUI.
sui_advantage: PTBs settle multiple debts across a group in a single atomic transaction, zkLogin lets anyone join with Google, sub-second finality for instant settlement.

name: GreenMile
one_liner: Carbon offset marketplace where verified carbon credits are tokenized and retirees earn eco-badges.
sui_advantage: Carbon credit objects with verifiable provenance chain, PTBs handle purchase-and-retire atomically, eco-badge NFTs with dynamic fields track lifetime impact.

name: BookSwap
one_liner: Peer-to-peer book exchange where readers trade physical books tracked by digital twin NFTs.
sui_advantage: Book twin objects track ownership history via dynamic fields, PTBs handle swap agreements atomically, SuiNS for reader profiles.

name: SubscriptionBox
one_liner: Decentralized subscription box marketplace where curators assemble monthly boxes and subscribers govern selections.
sui_advantage: Subscription objects auto-renew via Move logic, PTBs handle payment-shipment-tracking atomically, box NFTs serve as receipts with dynamic content fields.
